raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is reachable from the left/right sides (both accessible). Sufficient clearance exists on both lateral sides for two end-effectors to clamp the box without contacting box_1 or the table.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is securely clamped by both end-effectors and lifted slightly, clearing the top of box_1 and unblocking box_1's top surface."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "table (clear area to the right of box_1)",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is held securely. A clear placement region on the table to the right of box_1 is available and large enough (>=30x30 cm) to avoid re-stacking on box_1.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 rests on the table to the right of box_1 and is released, leaving box_1 unobstructed from above."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1's left/right/front sides are accessible and its top is no longer blocked by box_2. Sufficient lateral clearance exists for both end-effectors to clamp box_1 without contacting box_2 or the table.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box (box_1) is securely clamped and lifted off the table under dual-arm control."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is reachable from the left/right sides (both accessible). Sufficient clearance exists on both lateral sides for two end-effectors to clamp the box without contacting box_1 or the table.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is securely clamped by both end-effectors and lifted slightly, clearing the top of box_1 and unblocking box_1's top surface.

parsed_json.Target: table (clear area to the right of box_1)
parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is held securely. A clear placement region on the table to the right of box_1 is available and large enough (>=30x30 cm) to avoid re-stacking on box_1.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 rests on the table to the right of box_1 and is released, leaving box_1 unobstructed from above.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1's left/right/front sides are accessible and its top is no longer blocked by box_2. Sufficient lateral clearance exists for both end-effectors to clamp box_1 without contacting box_2 or the table.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box (box_1) is securely clamped and lifted off the table under dual-arm control.
